districts.title: District Intelligence
districts.subtitle: Neighborhood analytics and market yields across the 17 administrative districts of Banadir.
districts.expand_desc: 11 more districts currently undergoing geospatial analysis and yield auditing for Q3 reports.

Hodan.desc: The commercial heart of modern Mogadishu. High demand for office spaces and luxury villas.

Abdiaziz.desc: Coastal district famous for Liido Beach. Prime location for tourism and high-end apartments.

Waberi.desc: Strategic location near Aden Adde Airport. Busy residential and logistical hub.

Hamar Weyne.desc: The historic old city. Dense commercial activity with traditional shops and heritage sites.

Bondhere.desc: Centrally located with many government offices and quiet residential streets.

Wadajir.desc: Large residential district with diverse property types and expanding infrastructure.
